overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character walking through a dystopian urban environment during golden hour. The scene transitions from an industrial plaza with a burning vehicle through alleyways and across busy intersections, featuring cyberpunk architecture, elevated highways, and neon billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial plaza with burning vehicle wreckage

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through industrial plaza toward blue warehouse building with Maelstrom graffiti

notable_agents.action: distant figure walking near the blue building facade

entered.detail: large blue warehouse structure with yellow stripe and Maelstrom gang graffiti
wrecked car engulfed in flames emitting black smoke
illuminated advertisement screen mounted on the industrial building

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in an industrial plaza during golden hour, dominated by a massive blue warehouse building with gang graffiti. A burning vehicle sits to the left while the camera holder walks forward across the concrete ground, approaching the structure with scattered debris and distant pedestrians visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: alleyway with graffiti walls transitioning to main street

events.description: turns right from open plaza into narrow alley with green graffiti-covered walls

agents.ego_description: turning the corner and proceeding through the alleyway toward the main street with elevated highway visible ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with pink hair and yellow jacket walking toward camera then passing by

entered.detail: wall covered in green and blue gang tags and street art
massive concrete and steel highway overpass with support columns
large industrial waste container near the alley corner

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right into a narrow alleyway, leaving the blue building behind. Graffiti-covered concrete walls line the path as the scene opens toward a main street with an elevated highway structure visible in the distance. A distinctive pedestrian with pink hair passes by closely as the camera continues forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk street with elevated monorail highway

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk beneath the elevated highway structure, passing palm trees and approaching the intersection

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the sidewalk edge
multiple illuminated digital advertisements and neon signs on distant buildings
thick concrete pillars supporting the overhead highway structure

segments.scene_description: Walking along a medium-width street beneath the massive elevated highway, the scene features palm trees and cyberpunk billboards glowing in the golden hour light. The highway structure looms overhead with its support columns lining the left side, while distant neon advertisements become visible as the camera approaches a major intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy urban intersection with dense cyberpunk architecture

events.description: crossing the street while vehicles pass through the intersection
navigating through crossing pedestrians while maintaining forward momentum

agents.ego_description: crossing the busy intersection while navigating between pedestrians and observing the cyberpunk cityscape

notable_agents.action: dark sedan driving through the intersection perpendicular to camera path
person in dark clothing crossing the street in the same direction

entered.detail: dense cluster of high-rise structures with mixed industrial and modern glass facades
traffic signal infrastructure at the crosswalk corner
complex stacked architecture with multiple balconies and industrial piping

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide urban intersection filled with crossing pedestrians and moving traffic. The camera crosses the asphalt while navigating around other pedestrians, with towering cyberpunk buildings rising on all sides. Vehicles pass through the intersection as the elevated highway shifts to the left side of the frame, revealing dense neon-lit architecture ahead.

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk beneath highway signage and industrial steam pipes

entered.detail: large overhead metal framework supporting road signs and traffic control equipment
network of large pipes and steam vents running along the building facades
directional signage mounted on the highway overpass structure

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues along a sidewalk dominated by highway infrastructure. Large signage gantries and industrial pipelines line the path while the elevated highway recedes into the distance. The environment features utilitarian concrete architecture with steam rising from distant vents, maintaining the dystopian industrial atmosphere as the walk continues toward the horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a desolate industrial plaza into the heart of a dense, neon-lit cyberpunk metropolis during the golden hour. It begins by moving across a concrete plaza past a burning vehicle and a graffiti-covered blue warehouse before turning right into a narrow, graffiti-lined alleyway. As the camera emerges from the alley, the scene opens onto a street beneath a massive elevated highway, where palm trees and glowing billboards appear under the looming concrete structure. The path then expands into a wide urban intersection filled with crossing pedestrians and traffic, with the highway shifting to the side to reveal towering, neon-lit architecture. Finally, the camera continues along a utilitarian sidewalk lined with industrial pipelines and signage gantries, moving past rising steam vents as the highway recedes into the distance.
